---
title: "Calculator: Fractions, decimals, percentages"
author: Tom Coleman and Millie Harris
format: html
abstract-title: Summary
abstract: A calculator to convert between fractions, decimals, and percentages.
---

```{r, setup, include = FALSE}
library("webexercises")
```


```{=html}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Fractions • Decimals • Percentages Converter</title>

  <style>
    :root {
      --btn-color: #3f68b6;
      --btn-hover: #345597;
      --bg: #f7f9fc;
      --card: #ffffff;
      --text: #1f2937;
      --muted: #6b7280;
      --error: #b63f3f;
      --focus: #74a0ff;
    }
    body { margin:0; padding:2rem; background:var(--bg);
      font-family:system-ui, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial; color:var(--text); }
    .container {
      max-width:580px; margin:0 auto; background:var(--card);
      padding:1.75rem; border-radius:12px;
      box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(16,24,40,.08);
    }
    h1 { margin:0 0 1rem; font-size:1.4rem; }
    p.helper { color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:1.25rem; }

    label { font-weight:600; display:block; margin-bottom:.35rem; }
    input[type="text"] {
      width:100%; padding:.75rem .85rem; border-radius:8px;
      border:1px solid #e5e7eb; font-size:1rem;
      outline:none; transition:.15s;
    }
    input[type="text"]:focus {
      border-color:var(--focus);
      box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(116,160,255,.25);
    }
    .error { color:var(--error); min-height:1.1rem; }

    .section { margin-bottom:1.4rem; }

    .buttons{
      display:grid; gap:.7rem;
      grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    }
    button {
      padding:.75rem .5rem; border:none; border-radius:8px;
      background:var(--btn-color); color:white;
      font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;
      transition:.15s;
    }
    button:hover{ background:var(--btn-hover); }
    button:active{ transform:translateY(1px); }

    .clearBtn{
      background:#94a3b8;
      grid-column: span 3;
    }

    .output{
      margin-top:1.25rem; padding:1rem;
      background:#eef3ff; border:1px solid #d9e2ff;
      border-radius:8px; min-height:3rem;
      line-height:1.5;
      word-break: break-word;
    }
  </style>
</head>

<body>
  <main class="container">
    <h1>Fractions • Decimals • Percentages Converter</h1>
    <p class="helper">
      Enter a value in one form and convert to the other two.<br>
      Supports mixed numbers (for example: 1 3/4) and recurring decimals 
      using parentheses (for example: 0.(3), 1.2(45), 33.(3)).
    </p>

    <!-- FRACTION -->
    <div class="section">
      <label for="fraction">Fraction (for example: 3/4 or 2 1/5)</label>
      <input id="fraction" type="text" placeholder="for example: 1 3/4">
      <div id="errFraction" class="error"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- DECIMAL -->
    <div class="section">
      <label for="decimal">Decimal (for example: 0.75 or 33.(3))</label>
      <input id="decimal" type="text" placeholder="for example: 0.(3)">
      <div id="errDecimal" class="error"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- PERCENT -->
    <div class="section">
      <label for="percent">Percentage (for example: 75 or 12.(3))</label>
      <input id="percent" type="text" placeholder="for example: 62.5 or 33.(3)">
      <div id="errPercent" class="error"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="buttons">
      <button id="btnFrac">Convert Fraction</button>
      <button id="btnDec">Convert Decimal</button>
      <button id="btnPerc">Convert Percent</button>
      <button class="clearBtn" id="btnClear">Clear All</button>
    </div>

    <div class="output" id="outputBox"></div>

  </main>

<script>
/* ---------- DOM refs ---------- */
const fracIn = document.getElementById("fraction");
const decIn  = document.getElementById("decimal");
const percIn = document.getElementById("percent");

const errF = document.getElementById("errFraction");
const errD = document.getElementById("errDecimal");
const errP = document.getElementById("errPercent");

const out = document.getElementById("outputBox");

function clearErrors(){ errF.textContent = errD.textContent = errP.textContent = ""; }
function clearOut(){ out.textContent = ""; }

/* ---------- Utilities ---------- */
function gcd(a,b){ a = Math.abs(a); b = Math.abs(b); while(b){ [a,b] = [b, a%b]; } return a || 1; }

function reduceFraction(n,d){
  if (d === 0) return [NaN, NaN];
  const sign = d < 0 ? -1 : 1;
  n = n * sign; d = Math.abs(d);
  const g = gcd(n,d);
  return [n/g, d/g];
}

function toMixed(n, d){
  const sign = n < 0 ? -1 : 1;
  n = Math.abs(n);
  const whole = Math.trunc(n / d) * sign;
  const rem = n % d;
  return { whole, num: rem, den: d };
}

/* ---------- Fraction & mixed number parser ---------- */
function parseFraction(str){
  str = str.trim();

  // Mixed number: "2 1/3" or "-2 1/3"
  if (/^-?\d+\s+\d+\/\d+$/.test(str)){
    let [whole, frac] = str.split(/\s+/);
    let [n, d] = frac.split("/").map(Number);
    whole = Number(whole);
    n = Math.abs(n);
    let improper = whole < 0 ? whole*d - n : whole*d + n;
    return [improper, d];
  }

  // Simple fraction "3/4" or "-5/6"
  if (/^-?\d+\/\d+$/.test(str)){
    let [n,d] = str.split("/").map(Number);
    return [n,d];
  }

  return null;
}

/* ---------- Recurring decimal → exact fraction ----------
   Accepts: "A.B(C)" with optional sign, e.g., "0.(3)", "1.2(45)", "33.(3)", "-0.(6)"
--------------------------------------------------------- */
function recurringToFraction(input){
  let str = input.trim();

  // Extract sign explicitly
  let sign = 1;
  if (str.startsWith("-")) { sign = -1; str = str.slice(1); }
  else if (str.startsWith("+")) { str = str.slice(1); }

  const m = str.match(/^(\d*)\.?(\d*)\((\d+)\)$/);
  if (!m) return null;

  const A = m[1] === "" ? 0 : Number(m[1]); // integer part (unsigned)
  const B = m[2] || "";                     // non-repeating part
  const C = m[3];                            // repeating part

  const bLen = B.length;
  const cLen = C.length;

  const bNum  = B === "" ? 0 : Number(B);
  const bcNum = Number(B + C);

  // fractional numerator and denominator
  const numFrac = bcNum - bNum;
  const denFrac = (10**(bLen + cLen)) - (10**bLen);

  // total as improper fraction
  let num = A * denFrac + numFrac;
  let den = denFrac;

  num = sign * num;

  return reduceFraction(num, den);
}

/* ---------- Plain decimal string → exact fraction (no parentheses) ----------
   Accepts: "+12.34", "-.5", "0.125", "10", "0."
----------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
function plainDecimalToFraction(input){
  let s = input.trim();
  if (!s) return null;

  // Extract sign
  let sign = 1;
  if (s[0] === "-") { sign = -1; s = s.slice(1); }
  else if (s[0] === "+") { s = s.slice(1); }

  // Validate (no exponent support)
  if (!/^(\d+(\.\d*)?|\.\d+)$/.test(s)) return null;

  // Split parts
  let [intPart, fracPart] = s.split(".");
  if (typeof fracPart === "undefined") fracPart = "";
  if (intPart === "") intPart = "0";

  // Compose integer without decimal point
  const wholeDigits = intPart + fracPart;
  const numeratorAbs = Number(wholeDigits === "" ? "0" : wholeDigits);
  const denom = 10 ** (fracPart.length);

  const num = sign * numeratorAbs;
  return reduceFraction(num, denom === 0 ? 1 : denom);
}

/* ---------- Fraction → decimal parts (detect recurring) ----------
   Returns: { label, text, note, decNumeric }
   - If repeating with period ≤ 9: label="Decimal (recurring):", text="A.B(C)"
   - If repeating with period > 9: label="Decimal:", text="A.BBB…", note="(Repeating decimal too long to display)"
   - If terminating: label="Decimal:", text="A.B"
------------------------------------------------------------------- */
function fractionToDecimalDisplay(numer, denom, options = {}) {
  const MAX_NORMAL_DIGITS = options.maxDigits || 30; // for the plain decimal text
  const MAX_REPEAT_ALLOWED = options.maxRepeat || 9;

  if (denom === 0) {
    return { label: "Decimal:", text: "undefined", note: "", decNumeric: NaN };
  }

  // Sign handling
  const sign = (numer < 0) ^ (denom < 0) ? "-" : "";
  let N = Math.abs(numer);
  let D = Math.abs(denom);

  const intPart = Math.floor(N / D);
  let remainder = N % D;

  // If no fractional part
  if (remainder === 0) {
    return { label: "Decimal:", text: sign + intPart, note: "", decNumeric: numer/denom };
  }

  // Long division with remainder map to detect cycles
  const digits = [];
  const remainderIndex = new Map();
  let repeatStart = -1;

  while (remainder !== 0 && digits.length <= 5000) {
    if (remainderIndex.has(remainder)) {
      repeatStart = remainderIndex.get(remainder);
      break;
    }
    remainderIndex.set(remainder, digits.length);
    remainder *= 10;
    const digit = Math.floor(remainder / D);
    digits.push(digit);
    remainder = remainder % D;
  }

  if (repeatStart >= 0) {
    const nonRepeat = digits.slice(0, repeatStart).join("");
    const repeat = digits.slice(repeatStart).join("");
    const period = repeat.length;

    if (period <= MAX_REPEAT_ALLOWED) {
      // Show recurring with parentheses
      const dot = (nonRepeat || repeat) ? "." : ""; // safety
      return {
        label: "Decimal (recurring):",
        text: `${sign}${intPart}${dot}${nonRepeat}(${repeat})`,
        note: "",
        decNumeric: numer/denom
      };
    } else {
      // Too long: show normal decimal, capped, with note
      const flat = digits.join("");
      const shown = flat.slice(0, Math.max(repeatStart + Math.min(period, 6),  // show some of the cycle
                                            MAX_NORMAL_DIGITS));
      const dot = shown ? "." : "";
      return {
        label: "Decimal:",
        text: `${sign}${intPart}${dot}${shown}${shown.length < flat.length ? "…" : ""}`,
        note: "(Repeating decimal too long to display)",
        decNumeric: numer/denom
      };
    }
  } else {
    // Terminating decimal
    const fracDigits = digits.join("");
    const dot = fracDigits ? "." : "";
    return {
      label: "Decimal:",
      text: `${sign}${intPart}${dot}${fracDigits}`,
      note: "",
      decNumeric: numer/denom
    };
  }
}

/* ================
   FRACTION → DEC / %  (Option B behavior)
   ================ */
document.getElementById("btnFrac").onclick=()=>{
  clearErrors(); clearOut();

  const f = parseFraction(fracIn.value);
  if(!f){ errF.textContent="Enter a valid fraction or mixed number."; return; }

  let [n,d]=f;
  if(d===0){ errF.textContent="Denominator cannot be 0."; return; }

  const [sn, sd] = reduceFraction(n, d);

  // Decimal display with recurring support
  const decDisp = fractionToDecimalDisplay(sn, sd, { maxDigits: 30, maxRepeat: 9 });

  // Percent numeric
  const per = (decDisp.decNumeric * 100);

  // Mixed-form display for simplified fraction
  const mixed = toMixed(sn, sd);
  const mixedDisplay = mixed.num === 0
    ? `${mixed.whole}`
    : (mixed.whole !== 0 ? `${mixed.whole} ${mixed.num}/${mixed.den}` : `${mixed.num}/${mixed.den}`);

  out.innerHTML = `
    <strong>Fraction (as entered):</strong> ${n}/${d}<br>
    <strong>Simplified fraction:</strong> ${sn}/${sd} (${mixedDisplay})<br>
    <strong>${decDisp.label}</strong> ${decDisp.text}<br>
    ${decDisp.note ? `<em>${decDisp.note}</em><br>` : ""}
    <strong>Percent:</strong> ${per}%
  `;
};

/* ===================
   DECIMAL → FRAC / %
   =================== */
document.getElementById("btnDec").onclick=()=>{
  clearErrors(); clearOut();
  const raw = decIn.value.trim();
  if (!raw){ errD.textContent="Enter a decimal (supports recurring with parentheses)."; return; }

  // First try recurring decimal form exactly
  let frac = recurringToFraction(raw);
  let label = "Decimal:";

  if (!frac){
    // Then try plain decimal string
    frac = plainDecimalToFraction(raw);
    if(!frac){ errD.textContent="Enter a valid decimal (for example: 0.75, .5, 12, 0.(3), 1.2(45))."; return; }
  } else {
    label = "Decimal (recurring):";
  }

  let [numer, denom] = frac;

  const mixed = toMixed(numer, denom);
  const mixedDisplay = mixed.num === 0
    ? `${mixed.whole}`
    : (mixed.whole !== 0 ? `${mixed.whole} ${mixed.num}/${mixed.den}` : `${mixed.num}/${mixed.den}`);

  // Percent (simple numeric)
  const decNumeric = numer/denom;
  const per = decNumeric*100;

  out.innerHTML = `
    <strong>${label}</strong> ${raw}<br>
    <strong>Simplified fraction:</strong> ${numer}/${denom} (${mixedDisplay})<br>
    <strong>Percent:</strong> ${per}%
  `;
};

/* ===================
   PERCENT → DEC / FRAC
   (now supports recurring in the percent box)
   =================== */
document.getElementById("btnPerc").onclick=()=>{
  clearErrors(); clearOut();
  let raw = percIn.value.trim();
  if (!raw){ errP.textContent="Enter a percentage (for example: 75, 62.5, or 33.(3))."; return; }

  // Accept an optional trailing % sign and remove internal spaces
  raw = raw.replace(/\s+/g, "");
  let hadPercentSign = false;
  if (/%$/.test(raw)) { hadPercentSign = true; raw = raw.slice(0, -1); }

  // Try recurring percent first, then plain decimal
  let pFrac = recurringToFraction(raw); // fraction for the percent *value* p
  let percentLabel = hadPercentSign ? "Percent:" : "Percent:"; // keep label text stable
  if (pFrac) {
    percentLabel = "Percent (recurring):";
  } else {
    pFrac = plainDecimalToFraction(raw);
  }
  if (!pFrac) { errP.textContent="Enter a valid percentage (for example: 50, 12.5, 33.(3))."; return; }

  // Convert p% to proportion: p/100 exactly
  let [pNum, pDen] = pFrac;
  let numer = pNum;
  let denom = pDen * 100;
  [numer, denom] = reduceFraction(numer, denom);

  // Decimal display with recurring support (Option B + fallback Option 2)
  const decDisp = fractionToDecimalDisplay(numer, denom, { maxDigits: 30, maxRepeat: 9 });

  const mixed = toMixed(numer, denom);
  const mixedDisplay = mixed.num === 0
    ? `${mixed.whole}`
    : (mixed.whole !== 0 ? `${mixed.whole} ${mixed.num}/${mixed.den}` : `${mixed.num}/${mixed.den}`);

  // Use the cleaned raw number in the display (re-append %)
  out.innerHTML = `
    <strong>${percentLabel}</strong> ${raw}%<br>
    <strong>${decDisp.label}</strong> ${decDisp.text}<br>
    ${decDisp.note ? `<em>${decDisp.note}</em><br>` : ""}
    <strong>Simplified fraction:</strong> ${numer}/${denom} (${mixedDisplay})
  `;
};

/* ============
   CLEAR BUTTON
   ============ */
document.getElementById("btnClear").onclick=()=>{
  fracIn.value = decIn.value = percIn.value = "";
  clearErrors(); clearOut();
  fracIn.focus();
};

/* ===========================
   KEYBOARD SUPPORT
   =========================== */
const fields = [fracIn, decIn, percIn];
fields.forEach((el, index)=>{
  el.addEventListener("keydown",(e)=>{
    if(e.key==="Enter"){
      if(el===fracIn) document.getElementById("btnFrac").click();
      if(el===decIn)  document.getElementById("btnDec").click();
      if(el===percIn) document.getElementById("btnPerc").click();
    }
    if(e.key==="Escape"){
      document.getElementById("btnClear").click();
    }
    if(e.key==="ArrowDown"){
      fields[(index+1)%3].focus();
    }
    if(e.key==="ArrowUp"){
      fields[(index+2)%3].focus();
    }
  });
});
</script>

</body>
</html>

```


## Version history {-}

v1.0: initial version created 03/26 by tdhc and Millie Harris as part of a University of St Andrews VIP project. 
  
[This work is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1)
